title: DNA extraction for human microbe samples
author: Lilan Hao
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bcmriu56

steps.title: 200μl samples were mixed with 500...
steps.instruction: 200μl samples were mixed with 500 μl TE buffer and 20 μl of 10 mg/ml lysozyme solution.

steps.title: Incubate at 37 °C for 90min
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37 °C for 90min. Invert the tube several times to mix every 15 minutes. Centrifuge at 13,000 rcf/min for 10 min at 4 °C and discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Add 300 μl of 20 mg/ml...
steps.instruction: Add 300 μl of 20 mg/ml proteinase K and 5μl of 10% SDS. Vortex to resuspend cells.

steps.title: Incubate at 55 °C in a...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 55 °C in a shaking water bath for 120 min to effect complete lysis. Invert the tube several times to mix every 15 minutes.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 13,000 rcf/min for 10...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 13,000 rcf/min for 10 min at 4 °C, then transfer the supernatant to a nuclease-free 2 ml microfuge tube.

steps.title: Add 700 μl phenol-chloroform-isoamylalcohol (25:24:1) and...
steps.instruction: Add 700 μl phenol-chloroform-isoamylalcohol (25:24:1) and vortex to mix well, centrifuge at 13,000 rcf/min for 10 min at 4 °C, then transfer the supernatant to a nuclease-free 2 ml microfuge tube.

steps.title: Add 700 μl chloroform-isoamylalcohol (24:1) and vortex to mix well
steps.instruction: Add 700 μl chloroform-isoamylalcohol (24:1) and vortex to mix well. Centrifuge at 13,000 rcf/min for 10 min at 4 °C, then transfer the supernatant to a nuclease-free 1.5 ml microfuge tube.

steps.title: Add 1/10 volume of 3M sodium...
steps.instruction: Add 1/10 volume of 3M sodium acetate, 2 μl of 5 mg/ml glycogen and 800 μl cold isopropanol. Incubate at -20 °C for the night.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 13,000 rcf/min for 10...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 13,000 rcf/min for 10 min at 4 °C, then discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Washed with 800 μl of 70% ethanol
steps.instruction: Washed with 800 μl of 70% ethanol. Centrifuge at 13,000 rcf/min for 10 min at 4 °C, then discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Wash the precipitate with a second...
steps.instruction: Wash the precipitate with a second 800 μl of 70% ethanol and centrifuge as above. discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Let sit for 15 min to dry the precipitate
steps.instruction: Let sit for 15 min to dry the precipitate. Add 1×TE buffer to resuspend the precipitate.

steps.title: Add 1μl RNase A to samples...
steps.instruction: Add 1μl RNase A to samples and invert tube several times to mix. Incubate at 37 °C for 30 minutes.
